name: Creamy Stuffed Pasta Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble sausage into the casserole.
2. Add scallions and cook on high for three to four minutes, stirring occasionally until heated through.
3. Pour off excess fat from the casserole.
4. Stir in chicken, sauteed mushrooms, saltine crumbs, white wine, parsley, and celery salt until well combined.
5. Stuff 16 shells with the mixture, placing four shells in each gratin dish.
6. Pour Mornay Sauce (made by combining equal parts melted butter and grated Parmesan cheese) over the stuffed shells.
7. Cover dishes with plastic wrap.
8. Cook on high for seven to eight minutes, turning once halfway through to ensure even heating.
9. Spoon any remaining sauce over the pasta before serving.
10. Sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese, parsley, and paprika for garnish.
